vocabulary.example: The author contrasts online learning with traditional classroom instruction.
vocabulary.collocation: in contrast; contrast A with B
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 閱讀推論與寫作連接詞相關。

vocabulary.example: A persuasive response uses clear reasons and relevant examples.
The underlying cause of poor fluency is often insufficient practice.
Test takers often encounter unfamiliar words in academic passages.
Spaced review helps learners retain vocabulary longer.
Use transition phrases to connect ideas in academic writing.
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 寫作連接與口說流暢度。

vocabulary.example: Students must interpret the speaker's attitude in listening tasks.
Your tone should convey confidence without sounding arrogant.
Learners should allocate time wisely across all four skills.
Structured review can mitigate the problem of forgetting new words.
TOEFL reading covers diverse academic topics.
Mobile learning has shifted the paradigm of adult education.
Online learning is flexible enough for busy working adults.
vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 描述時間或方法的彈性。

vocabulary.example: I schedule twenty minutes of English practice every morning.
Many adult learners have limited time for daily practice.

grammar_focus.title: Using 'For example,...' to Support a Claim
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 在說明理由後加上 For example，讓回答更具說服力。
grammar_focus.pattern: I believe S + V. For example, S + V.
grammar_focus.example_basic: I believe practice helps. For example, I review ten words daily.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: I believe short daily practice is effective. For example, I spend fifteen minutes shadowing sentences every morning.

reading.title: Academic Skills for Test Success
reading.text: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to contrast passages, identify key persuasive in underlying, and draw reasonable encounter from incomplete information. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners retain the speaker's attitude. When writing academic responses, it is important to transition a clear position and support it with interpret. Many instructors convey combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A allocate review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From every mitigate, learners should extract useful phrases they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced diverse helps candidates paradigm their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.
reading.translation_tw: TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

listening_speaking.sentence: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: Students must learn to contrast passages, identify key persuasive in underlying, and draw reasonable encounter from incomplete information.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners retain the speaker's attitude.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: What are two key points you would write in your notes about today's topic?
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds contrast over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'contrast'?
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 contrast 的解釋為「對比」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

history_update.grammar_today: Using 'For example,...' to Support a Claim

gmail_email.subject: Day 2 英文學習｜Daily Routines and Time Management
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 2 英文學習

今日主題：Daily Routines and Time Management

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：17 分鐘

今日訓練：Listening - note-taking / signal words / attitude

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
contrast/ˈkɑːntræst/對比新詞
persuasive/pərˈsweɪsɪv/有說服力的新詞
underlying/ˌʌndərˈlaɪɪŋ/根本的；底層的新詞
encounter/ɪnˈkaʊntər/遇到新詞
retain/rɪˈteɪn/保留；記住新詞
transition/trænˈzɪʃən/轉換；過渡新詞
interpret/ɪnˈtɜːrprɪt/詮釋；解讀新詞
convey/kənˈveɪ/傳達新詞
allocate/ˈæləkeɪt/分配新詞
mitigate/ˈmɪtɪɡeɪt/減輕；緩和新詞
diverse/daɪˈvɜːrs/多樣的新詞
paradigm/ˈpærədaɪm/典範；模式新詞
flexible/ˈfleksəbl/有彈性的；靈活的複習
schedule/ˈskedʒuːl/行程；安排複習
limited/ˈlɪmɪtɪd/有限的複習

文法重點

Using 'For example,...' to Support a Claim

在說明理由後加上 For example，讓回答更具說服力。

I believe S + V. For example, S + V.

I believe short daily practice is effective. For example, I spend fifteen minutes shadowing sentences every morning.

閱讀：Academic Skills for Test Success

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to contrast passages, identify key persuasive in underlying, and draw reasonable encounter from incomplete information. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners retain the speaker's attitude. When writing academic responses, it is important to transition a clear position and support it with interpret. Many instructors convey combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A allocate review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From every mitigate, learners should extract useful phrases they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced diverse helps candidates paradigm their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.

中文翻譯：TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

Students must learn to contrast passages, identify key persuasive in underlying, and draw reasonable encounter from incomplete information.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners retain the speaker's attitude.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：What are two key points you would write in your notes about today's topic?

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds contrast over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'contrast'?

  • A. 對比
  • B. 有說服力的
  • C. 根本的
  • D. 遇到

答案：A — 今日單字 contrast 的解釋為「對比」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
